channel.title: Al Jazeera – Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera
channel.description: Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera

image.title: Al Jazeera – Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera
image.description: Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera

item.title: Police say they are responding to ‘active shooter’ at San Diego mosque
item.description: Authorities say they are deploying 'significant resources' to the scene of the incident at Islamic Center of San Diego.

item.title: Some change, but much more of the same in Palestinian Fatah elections
item.description: Abbas's son Yasser joins Fatah leadership, raising questions about nepotism and the group's commitment to inclusivity.

item.title: First Somaliland ambassador to Israel presents his credentials
item.description: Somaliland’s first ambassador to a foreign country presented his credentials to Israeli President Isaac Herzog.

item.title: Protests over fuel price hikes turn deadly in Kenya
item.description: Several people have been killed in protest violence in Kenya where transport workers blocked roads.

item.title: Could the Iran war trigger the next debt shock?
item.description: Government bonds are under pressure and households could soon feel the impact.

item.title: Iranian Nobel laureate Narges Mohammadi returns home after hospital release
item.description: Mohammadi will remain under 'close medical observation', her foundation says.

item.title: Cuba says it has ‘legitimate’ right to defend itself amid US threats
item.description: Cuban President Miguel Diaz-Canel says country is not a threat, but will defend itself from aggression if necessary.

item.title: Somaliland marks first Independence Day following Israeli recognition
item.description: Somaliland leaders tout stability and strategic importance as a hub, yet recognition from other nations remains elusive.

item.title: What to know about the primary elections in the US state of Pennsylvania
item.description: Eastern state could play a key role in deciding the balance of power in the US Congress in November midterm elections.

item.title: NextEra, Dominion to create huge power biz as AI drives US energy demand
item.description: One of the biggest proposed mergers this year, companies' union will create world's biggest regulated electric utility.

item.title: WHO chief ties funding cuts to Ebola, hantavirus outbreaks
item.description: Recent outbreaks of hantavirus and Ebola are tied to funding cuts to the WHO, the WHO chief and other UN leaders said.

item.title: Belarus dismisses concerns as it launches joint nuclear drills with Russia
item.description: Strong reactions from Ukraine and NATO allies as Belarusian and Russian forces train to use nuclear weapons.

item.title: Elon Musk loses US lawsuit against OpenAI
item.description: In a unanimous verdict, the jury in Oakland, California federal court said Musk had brought his case ⁠too late.

item.title: UN calls on Israel to prevent Gaza ‘genocide’
item.description: The United Nations rights chief called for Israel to 'end its unlawful presence in the Palestinian territory'.

item.title: Iran’s World Cup team arrives in Turkiye amid US visa uncertainty
item.description: Iran’s national football team has arrived in Turkiye for a pre-World Cup training camp, amid US visa uncertainty.

item.title: Trump drops IRS lawsuit, sets up $1.7bn US anti-weaponisation fund
item.description: The new fund has led to widespread pushback from Democrats and government watchdog groups.

item.title: World Cup 2026: Will violence and protests test Mexico’s cohost status?
item.description: Fans and rights groups have raised safety concerns in Mexico, which opens the FIFA World Cup on June 11 .

item.title: Philippines launches VP Duterte impeachment trial amid political division
item.description: Senate court established despite following House leadership changes and a shootout.

item.title: What we know about Israel’s interception of Gaza aid flotilla
item.description: Israeli forces have intercepted multiple vessels from the Gaza-bound Global Sumud Flotilla in international waters.

item.title: Kentucky primaries 2026: Poll times, key races and what to watch
item.description: Two Kentucky Republican races are drawing national attention in the US: the Senate primary and the 4th District contest.

item.title: Pakistan’s mediation faces limits as Iran-US tensions deepen
item.description: Tehran and Washington exchange proposals via Pakistan as military escalation increasingly shadows diplomatic efforts.

item.title: LIVE: Arsenal vs Burnley – Premier League
item.description: Follow our live build-up, with full team news coverage, ahead of our text commentary stream.

item.title: Former US negotiator with Iran: Trump falling into Vietnam trap
item.description: Rob Malley argues that current talks have ‘very small chance of success’.

item.title: Tata-ASML deal: How significant is it for India’s semiconductor push?
item.description: The agreement reflects India’s ambition to enter a sector dominated by a handful of global powers.

item.title: World Cup Golden Boot: which players have top scored at each tournament?
item.description: A look back at the top goal scorers in the FIFA World Cup's history, littered with some of the greats of football.
